publishedAbstract: A NooBaa (MCG) using 2 or more PVs as its Backing Store with "`spread`" configured fills the PVs extremely unevenly. This can be so extreme that one PV will traverse 80 percent, generating a capacity alert while the other PVs are somewhere less than 15% full.
publishedTitle: ODF:  A NooBaa (MCG) using 2 or more PVs as its Backing Store with "spread" configured fills the PVs extremely unevenly.
